creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
abmgmt is a toolkit for simplifying the processing of intrusion
attempts recorded in the system log, figuring out who should
know about them, and sending them a notification email.

How-To-Repeat: begin 644 abmgmt-1.94.port.tar.gz
